reasons: powershell may indicate suspicious command-line or PowerShell behavior.
-enc may indicate suspicious command-line or PowerShell behavior.
iex is commonly used in malicious or obfuscated script execution.

mitre_attack.reason: PowerShell is commonly used for command and script execution.
Encoded command usage may indicate command obfuscation.

detection_rules.description: Detects PowerShell execution using encoded command indicators.
detection_rules.reason: PowerShell execution with encoded command usage may indicate obfuscated script execution.

detection_rules.description: Detects use of IEX or Invoke-Expression patterns.
detection_rules.reason: IEX is commonly used to execute PowerShell content in memory.

detection_templates.description: Detects encoded PowerShell command execution in Microsoft Defender process telemetry.
detection_templates.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-enc", "-encodedcommand")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, ReportId

detection_templates.description: Detects PowerShell Invoke-Expression usage, commonly used in obfuscated execution chains.
detection_templates.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("iex", "invoke-expression")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, ReportId

detection_templates.description: Detects PowerShell execution using encoded command arguments.
detection_templates.query:
title: Suspicious PowerShell EncodedCommand
id: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000029
status: experimental
description: Detects PowerShell execution using encoded command arguments.
author: Encoded Command Analyzer
date: 2026/05/21
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1027
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
  selection_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '-enc'
      - '-encodedcommand'
  condition: selection_img and selection_cmd
falsepositives:
  - Administrative scripts
  - Software deployment tools
level: high
